energy_bands.description: Control lane: no explicit kick and no coherent shell vacuum seeding.
Low excitation: center motif left-multiplied by eXYZ basis kick at tick 0.
Medium excitation: center kick plus coherent +x nearest-neighbor vacuum phase seed (photon-like directional lane).
Higher excitation: center kick plus coherent +x shell-1 and shell-2 vacuum phase seeding.
